scripts.dev:all:3002: npx concurrently "npm run dev:3002" "npm run dev:websocket"
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=5120 npm run build -w dashboard
scripts.build:with-prisma: node scripts/prisma-generate-with-retry.js && prisma migrate deploy && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=5120 npm run build -w dashboard
scripts.build:typecheck: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=5120 npm run build -w dashboard
scripts.build:with-db: prisma generate && prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=5120 npm run build -w dashboard
scripts.verify-all: npm run verify-env && npm run verify-env-and-logs
scripts.test:demo: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_NO_WEB_SERVER=1 playwright test tests/e2e.demo.spec.ts -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run verify:db && npm run fix:ui-scanner-spec && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:no-verify: cross-env SKIP_DB_VERIFY=1 npm run fix:ui-scanner-spec && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run verify:db && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --ui
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run verify:db && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.test:e2e:route-health: npm run verify:db && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts route-health
scripts.test:e2e:route-health:serial: npm run verify:db && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts route-health --workers=1
scripts.test:e2e:ui-scanner: npm run verify:db && npm run fix:ui-scanner-spec && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/ui-scanner-run.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ui-scanner-single: npm run verify:db && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/ui-scanner-single.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:share: npm run verify:db && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_REPORT=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --workers=1 && npx tsx scripts/e2e-results-backup.ts && npx tsx scripts/e2e-results-to-markdown.ts
scripts.test:e2e:share:localdb: npm run db:local:up && npm run db:local:setup && npm run verify:db:local && npm run fix:ui-scanner-spec && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://payaid:payaid@127.0.0.1:5433/payaid_v3?schema=public REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6379 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_REPORT=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --workers=1 && npx tsx scripts/e2e-results-backup.ts && npx tsx scripts/e2e-results-to-markdown.ts
scripts.test:e2e:share:oom-safe: npm run verify:db && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_REPORT=1 playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --workers=1 && npx tsx scripts/e2e-results-to-markdown.ts
scripts.db:local:setup: cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://payaid:payaid@127.0.0.1:5433/payaid_v3?schema=public prisma generate && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://payaid:payaid@127.0.0.1:5433/payaid_v3?schema=public prisma db push && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://payaid:payaid@127.0.0.1:5433/payaid_v3?schema=public npm run db:seed
scripts.test:e2e:ui-scanner:localdb: npm run db:local:up && npm run db:local:setup && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://payaid:payaid@127.0.0.1:5433/payaid_v3?schema=public REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6379 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npm run fix:ui-scanner-spec && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts tests/ui-scanner-run.spec.ts
scripts.build:local: node scripts/prisma-generate-with-retry.js && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=5120 npm run build -w dashboard
scripts.analyze: cross-env ANALYZE=true node scripts/prisma-generate-with-retry.js && cross-env ANALYZE=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=5120 npm run build -w dashboard
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -n app,ws -c blue,magenta "node node_modules/turbo/bin/turbo dev --filter=dashboard" "npm run dev:websocket"
scripts.demo: npm run verify-env && npm run test:demo && node node_modules/turbo/bin/turbo build --parallel
